name: Newcore Gold Ltd.
description: Newcore Gold Ltd. is a Canadian-based gold exploration and development company focused on advancing its flagship Enchi Gold Project in southwest Ghana. The company is dedicated to building a responsive and powerful gold enterprise by leveraging a top-tier leadership team and prime exploration opportunities. The Enchi project, situated along the prolific Bibiani Shear Zone, hosts significant indicated and inferred mineral resources. Newcore Gold is actively engaged in extensive drill programs and technical studies, including a Pre-Feasibility Study, to maximize shareholder value and define the high-grade potential of its district-scale land package.
